product_overview: A web-based inventory management system for medical colleges that lets admins and staff track stock, manage suppliers, handle requests and returns, monitor expiries, and view analytics.
core_goals: Allow staff to request and return medical inventory and track their own transactions
Enable admins to add, update, delete, and restock inventory and manage supplier records
Provide visibility into inventory health through dashboard metrics, low-stock alerts, expiry tracking, and audit logs
Support quick item lookup via search, filters, and barcode/QR scanning

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in or create an account to access role-based features (staff or admin).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password -> Submit credentials -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Toggle between login and signup modes -> Fill required signup information -> Submit to create account -> See dashboard

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: At-a-glance metrics and usage charts summarizing inventory totals, usage trends, and low-stock counts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See summary stats cards for total items, available units, issued units, and low-stock count
Navigate to / -> Select a metrics panel or timeframe -> See updated usage charts and category breakdown

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Create, read, update, delete, search, filter, and restock inventory items; view inventory details and lists.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> Choose to add a new inventory item -> Fill item details including name, code, quantity, and location -> Submit the new item -> See the new item listed in inventory
Navigate to /inventory -> Search or apply filters to find an item -> Select an item to edit -> Update item fields -> Submit changes -> See the updated item in inventory
Navigate to /inventory -> Search or apply filters to find an item -> Delete the item -> See the item removed from the inventory list
Navigate to /inventory -> Use search or filters to narrow results -> See filtered inventory results
Navigate to /inventory -> Identify an item to restock -> Enter restock quantity and details -> Submit restock -> See the item's available quantity updated

features.name: Barcode Scanning
features.description: Use the device camera to scan item barcodes or QR codes and quickly locate matching inventory records.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> Start scanning using the camera -> Scan a barcode or QR code -> See the matched item displayed in the inventory results

features.name: Transactions and Requests
features.description: Create and manage stock requests, issue items (admin), and record returns; view transaction history and statuses.
user_flows: Navigate to /transactions -> Create a request for an item -> Fill item, quantity, department, and notes -> Submit the request -> See the request listed with PENDING status

Navigate to /transactions -> Find a pending request -> Approve and issue the request as an approver -> Enter issued quantity and processor details -> Submit issuance -> See the request status updated to APPROVED or COMPLETED
Navigate to /transactions -> Create a return transaction -> Fill item and return quantity -> Submit the return -> See the return listed with COMPLETED status

features.name: Notifications and Alerts
features.description: View and manage system alerts including low-stock notifications, with read/unread tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> See a list of alerts including low-stock notifications -> Filter to show unread alerts -> Mark a notification as read -> See the notification status updated to read
Navigate to /notifications -> Trigger low-stock alert generation (admin) -> See newly generated low-stock alerts appear in the list

features.name: Supplier Management
features.description: Manage supplier records used for inventory sourcing and contact information.
user_flows: Navigate to /suppliers -> Choose to add a new supplier -> Fill supplier name, contact and address details -> Submit the new supplier -> See the supplier listed
Navigate to /suppliers -> Search or filter suppliers -> Edit supplier details -> Submit changes -> See updated supplier information
Navigate to /suppliers -> Search or filter suppliers -> Delete a supplier -> See the supplier removed from the list

features.name: Audit Logs
features.description: Review a chronological record of system actions for accountability and troubleshooting.
user_flows: Navigate to /audit -> See a chronological list of audit events showing actions, users, and timestamps
Navigate to /audit -> Apply filters by user or action type -> See filtered audit events

features.name: Expiry Management
features.description: Track items approaching expiry dates and take actions to manage expiring stock.
user_flows: Navigate to /expiry -> See a list of items nearing expiry with expiry dates and quantities
Navigate to /expiry -> Filter items by timeframe or category -> See filtered expiring items
Navigate to /expiry -> Select an expiring item to record an action such as flagging for disposal or transfer -> Submit the action -> See the item flagged or updated

features.name: Departmental Allocation
features.description: Allocate and track stock distribution across departments.
user_flows: Navigate to /departments -> See a list of departments and current allocations -> Select a department to view details
Navigate to /departments -> Start an allocation to a department -> Enter allocation quantity and notes -> Submit allocation -> See the department's allocation updated

features.name: Compliance Management
features.description: Record and monitor safety and regulatory compliance items and their statuses.
user_flows: Navigate to /compliance -> See compliance checklists and current statuses for items and processes
Navigate to /compliance -> Update a compliance item status or add a compliance note -> Submit the update -> See the compliance status updated

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Toggle between login and signup modes
